title: Subtly Musical
description: A spin off resource pack adding music that's been added to the Subtly Dungeons mod. Music comes from Minecraft Dungeons and Minecraft Legends!
body:
# Subtly Musical Subtly Musical is a spin-off resource pack adding music that's been added to the **[Subtly Dungeons mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/subtly-dungeons)**. Music comes from Minecraft Dungeons and Minecraft Legends!

**Some of the music can be heard in this video!**
